ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wines" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine */,
  "sku" INTEGER /* Stock Keeping Unit for inventory tracking */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the wine */,
  "friendly_name" TEXT /* Friendly name for display purposes */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the wine */,
  "price" REAL /* Retail price of the wine */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the wine */,
  "tasting_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the flavor and aroma of the wine */,
  "pairing_suggestion" TEXT /* Recommended food pairings for the wine */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average customer rating of the wine */,
  "abv" TEXT /* Alcohol by volume percentage */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the wine */,
  "image" TEXT /* File name of the image for display */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the wine is produced */,
  "wine_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of wine */,
  "winery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the winery that produces the wine */,
  "vintage" TEXT /* The year the grapes were harvested */,
  "bottle_size" TEXT /* The size of the wine bottle (e.g., 750ml, 1.5L) */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* The date the wine was produced */,
  "best_served_temperature" TEXT /* The optimal temperature for serving the wine */,
  "organic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the wine is organic */,
  "sustainable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the wine is produced using sustainable methods */,
  "available_in_countries" TEXT /* A list of countries where the wine is available */,
  "available_vintages" TEXT /* A list of available vintages for the wine */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Any awards the wine has received */,
  "grape_varieties" TEXT /* The grape varieties used in the wine */,
  "serving_suggestions" TEXT /* Additional serving suggestions */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The last time the wine entry was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_wine_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_type_id") REFERENCES wine_types ("wine_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_winery_id FOREIGN KEY ("winery_id") REFERENCES wineries ("winery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the wine region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region and its wine characteristics */,
  "country" TEXT /* The country where the region is located */,
  "climate" TEXT /* The climate of the region */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* The type of soil in the region */,
  "topography" TEXT /* The topography of the region */,
  "average_rainfall" TEXT /* The average annual rainfall in the region */,
  "harvest_season" TEXT /* The typical harvest season in the region */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The last time the region entry was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wine_types" (
  "wine_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., red, white, rosé) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the wine type */,
  "body" TEXT /* The body of the wine (e.g., light, medium, full) */,
  "acidity" TEXT /* The acidity level of the wine */,
  "tannin_level" TEXT /* The tannin level of the wine */,
  "sugar_content" TEXT /* The sugar content of the wine */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The last time the wine type entry was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wine_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wineries" (
  "winery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each winery */,
  "winery_name" TEXT /* Name of the winery */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the winery */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the winery */,
  "established" TEXT /* The year the winery was established */,
  "website" TEXT /* The winery's website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the winery's social media profiles */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Any awards the winery has received */,
  "sustainability_practices" TEXT /* Practices the winery uses to ensure sustainability */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The last time the winery entry was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("winery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wine being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user submitting the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "pros" TEXT /* Positive aspects of the wine mentioned in the review */,
  "cons" TEXT /* Negative aspects of the wine mentioned in the review */,
  "buy_again" INTEGER /* Whether the user would buy the wine again */,
  "recommended" INTEGER /* Whether the user would recommend the wine to others */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The last time the review was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password for the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences for wine types, regions, etc. */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last time the user logged in */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The last time the user entry was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wine in stock */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Quantity of the wine currently in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which to reorder more stock */,
  "last_stock_check" TEXT /* The date of the last stock check */,
  "next_reorder_date" TEXT /* The date when the next reorder is due */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier */,
  "cost_price" REAL /* The cost price of the wine */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The last time the inventory entry was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("id")
)
